title: PrepareFollowupSpecsReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``prepare-followup-specs`` (#278).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). Reports the absolute paths of the two pre-staged spec
files written under the experiment dir (``monitor_spec.json`` +
``aggregate_spec.json``), plus the ``run_id`` they target and the
``cmd_sha`` staleness gate stamped into them (echoed so the caller can
confirm what was written without re-reading the files).

monitor_spec_path.title: Monitor Spec Path
monitor_spec_path.description: Absolute path of the written monitor_spec.json (<experiment_dir>/monitor_spec.json).

aggregate_spec_path.title: Aggregate Spec Path
aggregate_spec_path.description: Absolute path of the written aggregate_spec.json (<experiment_dir>/aggregate_spec.json).

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Run id both pre-staged specs target.

cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha
cmd_sha.description: cmd_sha staleness gate stamped into both specs, echoed back. Null when none was supplied at submit time.
